title: Unveiling the properties and origin of massive quenched galaxies at $z\ge2$ in the COLIBRE hydrodynamical simulations
comment: Submitted for publication in MNRAS. 32 pages (24 of main body and 8 of appendices). Comments welcome
summary: JWST has uncovered a substantial population of Massive ($M_{\star} \gtrsim 10^{10 }\mathrm{M_{\odot}}$), Quenched Galaxies (MQGs) in the early Universe ($z \gtrsim 2$), whose properties challenge current galaxy formation models. In this paper, we examine this population of MQGs within the new COLIBRE cosmological hydrodynamical simulations. We report number densities and stellar mass functions in broad agreement with the latest observations. The predicted quenching and formation timescales are qualitatively consistent with observational inferences. Leveraging the state-of-the-art physics in COLIBRE, the model predicts that MQGs have dust and $\rm H_{2}$ fractions more than $1$ dex lower than their massive star-forming counterparts; while their sizes and kinematics remain broadly similar. We further explore the processes driving galaxies to become massive and quenched in COLIBRE, identifying active galactic nucleus (AGN) feedback as the primary quenching mechanism. Compared to star-forming galaxies of similar mass, MQGs host more massive black holes (BHs) and exhibit higher star formation efficiencies. These differences arise from their environments, particularly at local ($\rm 0.3\,cMpc$) to intermediate scales ($\rm 1.0\,cMpc$) before quenching, where overdense regions are associated with enhanced gas inflows, higher BH accretion and, hence, feedback power. We find that about $55\%$ of MQGs survive as the main progenitors of $z=0$ galaxies when they are selected at $z=3$, although up to $55\%$ experience rejuvenation episodes. Our results provide robust predictions for MQGs, show that tensions with observations are reduced when an effective observational uncertainty is forward-modelled, and clarify the mechanisms behind their origin.

AI.tldr: JWST观测到早期宇宙中存在大量大质量静止星系，COLIBRE模拟显示这些星系主要通过AGN反馈机制静止化，其环境密度影响气体流入和黑洞吸积。
AI.motivation: JWST在早期宇宙中发现了大量大质量静止星系，其特性挑战了现有的星系形成模型，需要新的模拟来解释这些星系的形成和静止化机制。
AI.method: 使用新的COLIBRE宇宙流体动力学模拟，分析大质量静止星系的数量密度、恒星质量函数、静止化时间尺度，并研究其物理特性（尘埃、H₂分数、大小、运动学）和形成机制。
AI.result: 模拟结果与观测基本一致；大质量静止星系的尘埃和H₂分数比同质量恒星形成星系低1个数量级以上；AGN反馈是主要静止化机制；这些星系拥有更巨大的黑洞和更高的恒星形成效率；约55%的z=3大质量静止星系能存活到z=0。
AI.conclusion: COLIBRE模拟为大质量静止星系提供了可靠的预测，显示当考虑观测不确定性时与观测的紧张关系得到缓解，并阐明了这些星系起源背后的机制，特别是AGN反馈在静止化过程中的关键作用。

recommendation.method_fit: 使用COLIBRE流体动力学模拟，与用户常用的观测方法（如JWST、ALMA）不同，但模拟结果与观测对比，有一定方法关联。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST在早期宇宙（$z \gtrsim 2$）中发现了一大批大质量（$M_{\star} \gtrsim 10^{10 }\mathrm{M_{\odot}}$）静止星系（MQGs），其性质对当前的星系形成模型提出了挑战。本文在最新的COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟中研究了这群MQGs。我们报告了与最新观测大致一致的数密度和恒星质量函数。预测的静止和形成时标在定性上与观测推断一致。利用COLIBRE中最先进的物理过程，模型预测MQGs的尘埃和$\rm H_{2}$丰度比其大质量恒星形成对应体低1个dex以上；而它们的大小和运动学则大致相似。我们进一步探索了COLIBRE中驱动星系变得大质量并静止的过程，确定活动星系核反馈是主要的静止机制。与相似质量的恒星形成星系相比，MQGs拥有更大质量的黑洞，并表现出更高的恒星形成效率。这些差异源于它们的环境，特别是在静止前的局域（$\rm 0.3\,cMpc$）到中等尺度（$\rm 1.0\,cMpc$）上，过密区域与增强的气体流入、更高的黑洞吸积率以及由此产生的更强反馈功率相关。我们发现，当在$z=3$处选择时，约55%的MQGs作为$z=0$星系的主要前身存活下来，尽管高达55%的MQGs经历了再活跃期。我们的结果为MQGs提供了可靠的预测，表明当正向模拟有效的观测不确定性时，与观测的紧张关系得到缓解，并阐明了其起源背后的机制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，COLIBRE模拟为大质量静止星系提供了可靠的预测，显示当考虑观测不确定性时与观测的紧张关系得到缓解，并阐明了这些星系起源背后的机制，特别是AGN反馈在静止化过程中的关键作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top panel : normalised SFHs ( \(SFR/SFR_{max}\) versus lookback time, with redshift indicated by the top \(x\) -axis) of two example galaxies identified to be massive and quenched at \(z=3\) in L200m6. The horizontal solid line corresponds to the peak SFR value, \(SFR_{max}\) , while the dotted line shows the \(0.1\times SFR_{max}\) threshold used to define the quenching timescale, \(t_{q}\) . Arrows indicate \(t_{q}\) for each galaxy, defined as the latest time the galaxy’s SFR drops below this threshold; as well as the SFR peak time, \(t_{SFR_{max}}\) . The green curve represents a galaxy that, once it has crossed the threshold indicated by the dotted line, never rises above it again. The orange curve represents a galaxy that experiences several star formation episodes above the threshold after its SFR peak. Bottom panel : normalised stellar mass assembly histories, \textcolor black \(M_{\star}^{{f}}/M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) , versus lookback time, with redshift indicated by the top \(x\) -axis) for the same galaxies. The horizontal solid line shows the maximum \textcolor black“formed” stellar mass value, \textcolor black \(M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) ; while the dotted line shows the \textcolor black \(0.5\times M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) threshold used to define the formation timescale, \(t_{50}\) . Arrows indicate \(t_{50}\) .

title: A faint M$_{\rm UV} = -14.5$ Lyman continuum leaker in the reionization epoch: unprecedented Ly$α$ properties at z=5.725
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables (including appendices). Submitted to A&A Letters
summary: We report the unprecedented Ly$α$ properties of AMORE6, an extremely metal-poor ($12+\log({\rm O/H}) < 6$), low-mass ($M_\star = 4.4\times10^{5}\,M_\odot$), and ultra-compact (effective radius $\lesssim30$ pc) dwarf galaxy at $z=5.7253$, gravitationally lensed by the cluster A2744. A prominent, narrow, and nearly-symmetric Ly$α$ emission line is detected at the systemic redshift (the latter traced by H$β$, from JWST/NIRCam slitless spectroscopy), with rest-frame $EW=150\pm10$ Å, $\rm FWHM=58\pm1$ km s$^{-1}$, and a slight asymmetry, resulting in a $\rm \sim10\%$ flux excess in the red wing of the line. The negligible velocity offset from systemic ($dv = 4\pm67$ km s$^{-1}$, $3σ$ uncertainty), together with the sharpness and symmetry of the profile, indicates minimal radiative transfer effects implying a neutral hydrogen column density consistent with an optically thin medium, compatible with a non-zero ionizing photon escape fraction. If indirect spectral diagnostics calibrated at $z<4.5$ remain the only viable tools to identify LyC leakers during reionization, then based on its strongest indicator (Ly$α$), AMORE6 stands out as one of the most compelling LyC-leaking candidates yet discovered in the reionization epoch.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了AMORE6前所未有的Lyα特性，这是一个极端贫金属（12+log(O/H) < 6）、低质量（M_⋆ = 4.4×10^5 M_⊙）且超致密（有效半径 ≲30 pc）的矮星系，红移z=5.7253，受到星系团A2744的引力透镜效应。在系统红移处（后者由Hβ示踪，来自JWST/NIRCam无缝光谱）探测到一条显著、窄且近乎对称的Lyα发射线，其静止系等效宽度EW=150±10 Å，半高全宽FWHM=58±1 km s⁻¹，并具有轻微的不对称性，导致谱线红翼存在约10%的流量过剩。相对于系统红移的速度偏移可忽略不计（dv = 4±67 km s⁻¹，3σ不确定度），加上谱线的尖锐和对称性，表明辐射转移效应极小，意味着中性氢柱密度与光学薄介质一致，且与非零的电离光子逃逸分数相容。如果仅在z<4.5校准的间接光谱诊断仍是再电离时期识别LyC泄漏者的唯一可行工具，那么基于其最强指标（Lyα），AMORE6是再电离时代迄今发现的最令人信服的LyC泄漏候选体之一。

title: The dominant role of dark matter halo in quenching central galaxies
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures; From Halos to Galaxies XII; submitted
summary: Understanding the quenching of star formation in central galaxies remains a core challenge in galaxy evolution. Two decades ago, the concept of halo quenching was introduced as a dominant mechanism, positing that massive central galaxy quenching is governed by the thermodynamics of gas predominantly influenced by dark matter halos. However, a vastly increasing body of observational evidence consistently indicates that quenching correlates predominantly with central properties like velocity dispersion, bulge mass, and black hole mass. When these properties are controlled, halo mass appears to show weak influence, supporting AGN feedback as the primary mechanism. A recurring key issue, however, is that these studies rely on halo masses derived via abundance matching (AM). Direct observational measurements from weak lensing, satellite kinematics, and galactic dynamics reveal that AM systematically overestimates halo masses of star-forming centrals while underestimating those of passive ones. To accurately assess the true role of halo mass. we re-estimated halo masses for SDSS groups; the resulting halo mass function and stellar-to-halo mass relations (SHMRs) for both populations match theoretical predictions and weak lensing measurements. Using these improved masses, we find direct observational evidence that halo mass is the dominant factor in quenching central galaxies, with a clear threshold at $M_{h}\sim 10^{12.1}M_\odot; $. By applying a simple correction to AM data using weak lensing-derived SHMRs, we demonstrate that previous claims regarding the dominance of central properties stem primarily from systematic biases in AM halo masses. Our results suggest that the significance of AGN feedback is primarily manifested in halos above this mass threshold, in galaxies already primed for quenching. In other words, AGN feedback appears to become effective in halos above this mass threshold.

AI.tldr: 该研究重新评估了晕质量在中心星系恒星形成淬灭中的作用，发现当使用改进的晕质量估计（而非丰度匹配方法）时，晕质量是淬灭的主导因素，存在约10^12.1太阳质量的阈值。
AI.motivation: 传统研究依赖丰度匹配方法估计晕质量，但该方法存在系统偏差（高估恒星形成中心星系的晕质量，低估被动星系的晕质量），导致对晕质量在淬灭中作用的评估不准确。需要更精确的晕质量测量来澄清晕淬灭与AGN反馈的相对重要性。
AI.method: 重新估计SDSS星系群的晕质量，使用改进的晕质量函数和恒星-晕质量关系，匹配理论预测和弱引力透镜测量。对丰度匹配数据应用基于弱透镜SHMR的简单校正，以消除系统偏差。
AI.result: 发现晕质量是中心星系淬灭的主导因素，存在明确的阈值M_h∼10^12.1M⊙。先前关于中心属性（速度弥散、核球质量、黑洞质量）主导淬灭的结论主要源于丰度匹配晕质量的系统偏差。AGN反馈的重要性主要在该质量阈值以上的晕中显现。
AI.conclusion: 晕质量是中心星系恒星形成淬灭的主要驱动因素，存在约10^12.1太阳质量的阈值。AGN反馈在该阈值以上的晕中变得有效，但星系已准备好淬灭。先前研究低估晕质量作用的原因是丰度匹配方法的系统偏差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 理解中心星系恒星形成的淬灭仍是星系演化中的核心挑战。二十年前，晕淬灭的概念被引入作为一种主导机制，认为大质量中心星系的淬灭由主要受暗物质晕影响的气体热力学支配。然而，大量不断增加的观测证据一致表明，淬灭主要与中心属性（如速度弥散、核球质量和黑洞质量）相关。当控制这些属性时，晕质量似乎影响微弱，支持AGN反馈作为主要机制。然而，一个反复出现的关键问题是，这些研究依赖于通过丰度匹配（AM）导出的晕质量。来自弱引力透镜、卫星运动学和星系动力学的直接观测测量表明，AM系统性地高估了恒星形成中心星系的晕质量，同时低估了被动中心星系的晕质量。为了准确评估晕质量的真实作用，我们重新估计了SDSS星系的晕质量；由此得到的两个星系的晕质量函数和恒星-晕质量关系（SHMRs）与理论预测和弱引力透镜测量一致。利用这些改进的质量，我们发现了直接观测证据，表明晕质量是淬灭中心星系的主导因素，在$M_{h}\sim 10^{12.1}M_\odot$处存在一个清晰的阈值。通过使用弱引力透镜导出的SHMRs对AM数据进行简单校正，我们证明先前关于中心属性主导性的主张主要源于AM晕质量的系统性偏差。我们的结果表明，AGN反馈的重要性主要体现于该质量阈值以上的晕中，即那些已准备好淬灭的星系中。换句话说，AGN反馈似乎在该质量阈值以上的晕中变得有效。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，晕质量是中心星系恒星形成淬灭的主要驱动因素，存在约10^12.1太阳质量的阈值。AGN反馈在该阈值以上的晕中变得有效，但星系已准备好淬灭。先前研究低估晕质量作用的原因是丰度匹配方法的系统偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The important role of halo mass in central galaxy quenching. The median sSFR (left) and \(\Delta\) MS (right) of central galaxies are shown as a function of halo mass and central velocity dispersion. Halo masses are estimated using the machine learning (ML) method described in Zhao et al. 2025ApJ...979...42Z . Colors indicate the median value shown in each panel, and the black contours trace iso-levels of the same quantity. The vertical and horizontal green lines ( \(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\) and \(V_{disp}\sim 85\,km\,s^{-1}\) ) define a characteristic L-shaped threshold. Crucially, galaxies with halo masses below this threshold remain star-forming regardless of their central velocity dispersion, whereas quenching dominates only in massive halos coupled with high central velocity dispersion.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：晕质量在中心星系淬灭中的重要作用。中心星系的中值sSFR（左）和\(\Delta\) MS（右）作为晕质量和中心速度弥散的函数显示。晕质量使用Zhao等人2025ApJ...979...42Z中描述的机器学习（ML）方法估计。颜色表示每个面板中显示的中值，黑色等高线追踪相同量的等值线。垂直和水平绿线（\(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\)和\(V_{disp}\sim 85\,km\,s^{-1}\)）定义了一个特征性的L形阈值。关键的是，晕质量低于该阈值的星系无论其中心速度弥散如何都保持恒星形成，而淬灭仅在与高中心速度弥散耦合的大质量晕中占主导。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of sSFR variations using AM-derived halo masses. Analogous to the left panel of Fig. 1 , but using halo masses derived via the AM method based on total stellar mass ranking (left) and total \(r\) -band luminosity ranking (right) 2007ApJ...671..153Y . The magenta line at \(V_{disp}\sim 125~km\,s^{-1}\) marks the apparent quenching threshold reported in previous studies. The green lines correspond to the L-shaped threshold identified in Fig. 1 . Data are restricted to galaxies with \(M_{{h}}>10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\) , corresponding to the low-mass cutoff of the AM halo-mass estimates in the group catalogue.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用AM导出晕质量的sSFR变化比较。类似于图1的左面板，但使用基于总恒星质量排序（左）和总\(r\)波段光度排序（右）的AM方法导出的晕质量2007ApJ...671..153Y。\(V_{disp}\sim 125~km\,s^{-1}\)处的品红色线标记了先前研究中报告的明显淬灭阈值。绿线对应于图1中识别的L形阈值。数据限制在\(M_{{h}}>10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\)的星系，对应于星表目录中AM晕质量估计的低质量截止。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Origin of the discrepancy: systematic bias in abundance matching. Left: SHMRs for star-forming (blue) and passive (red) galaxies. Solid and dashed lines represent results from our ML method 2025ApJ...979...42Z and the AM method with total stellar mass ranking 2007ApJ...671..153Y , respectively. The upturn of the AM results (dashed lines) at the low-mass end is an artifact caused by the halo mass cutoff at \(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\) . Data points with error bars represent independent weak lensing measurements from Mandelbaum et al. 2016MNRAS.457.3200M and Bilicki et al. 2021A&A...653A..82B . Shaded regions and error bars indicate the 16–84th percentile ranges. Right: The median sSFR distribution re-calculated using AM halo masses after applying a systematic correction ( \(\pm 0.15\) dex) derived from the weak lensing results. This simple correction largely recovers the L-shaped threshold (green lines) observed in Fig. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：差异的起源：丰度匹配中的系统性偏差。左：恒星形成（蓝色）和被动（红色）星系的SHMRs。实线和虚线分别代表我们的ML方法2025ApJ...979...42Z和具有总恒星质量排序的AM方法2007ApJ...671..153Y的结果。AM结果（虚线）在低质量端的上升是由\(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\)处的晕质量截止引起的伪影。带有误差棒的数据点代表来自Mandelbaum等人2016MNRAS.457.3200M和Bilicki等人2021A&A...653A..82B的独立弱引力透镜测量。阴影区域和误差棒表示16-84百分位范围。右：在应用从弱引力透镜结果导出的系统性校正（\(\pm 0.15\) dex）后，使用AM晕质量重新计算的中值sSFR分布。这一简单校正很大程度上恢复了图1中观察到的L形阈值（绿线）。

title: Discovering gravitational waveform distortions from lensing: a deep dive into GW231123
summary: Gravitational waves (GWs) are unique messengers as they travel through the Universe without alteration except for gravitational lensing. Their long wavelengths make them susceptible to diffraction by cosmic structures, providing an unprecedented opportunity to map dark matter substructures. Identifying lensed events requires the analysis of thousands to millions of simulated events to reach high statistical significances. This is computationally prohibitive with standard GW parameter estimation methods. We build on top of state-of-the-art neural posterior algorithms to accelerate the lensed inference from CPU days to minutes with DINGO-lensing. We showcase its capabilities by reanalyzing GW231123, the most promising lensed candidate so far, and find that its statistical significance cannot exceed 4$σ$. We observe that 8% of GW231123-like nonlensed simulations favor lensing, which could be explained by the self-similarity of short-duration signals. Still, 58% of GW231123-like lensed simulations have larger support for lensing, showing that higher detection statistics are possible. Although GW231123 exposes the challenges of claiming the first GW lensing detection, our deep-learning methods have demonstrated to be powerful enough to enable the upcoming discovery of lensed GWs.

title: The AGN nature of strong CIII emitters in the Early Universe with JWST
summary: The semi-forbidden CIII] $λλ$1907,1909 doublet is a key tracer of high-ionization emission in the early universe. We present a study of CIII] emission in galaxies at z=5-7, using publicly available JWST/NIRSpec prism data from programs including CEERS, JADES, RUBIES and CAPERS. We built a sample of 61 CIII]-emitting galaxies, and we classified them as star-forming or active galactic nuclei (AGN) host galaxies using (1) rest-frame UV and optical emission-line diagnostic diagrams, and (2) the presence/absence of broad Balmer emission lines. The UV diagnostics are based on the combination of the rest-frame equivalent width (EW) of CIII] versus CIII]/HeII $λ$1640, and the EW of CIV versus CIV/HeII $λ$1640. For optical diagnostics, we employ the OHNO diagram, which combines [OIII] $λ$5007, H$β$, [NeIII] $λ$3869, and [OII] $λλ$3727,3729- and we find it has a low efficiency on separating AGN from SFG. We find that half of the sources in our sample (29 out of 61 galaxies) exhibit at least one secure indication of AGN activity while 13 are potential AGNs based on the CIII] diagnostic. Physical properties, including stellar mass and star formation rate, are derived through spectral energy distribution modeling with Bagpipes. Our analysis reveals that JWST is uncovering a population of strong CIII] emitters at high redshift (5<z<7) with a median EW of 22.8 A. This EW is higher than that of a control sample of CIII] emitters at redshift 3<z<4 with a median EW of 4.7 A. We find that for the same range of Muv, the CIII] EW increases by $\sim$0.67 dex from 3<z<4 to 5<z<7, indicating strong redshift evolution in the line's strength. Finally, we identify five sources in our sample as Little Red Dots (LRDs); while four of these have already been identified as LRD in the literature, one is presented here for the first time.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现高红移(5<z<7)星系中CIII]发射线强度显著增强，半数的CIII]发射星系显示AGN活动迹象，CIII]等效宽度从z=3-4到z=5-7增加了约0.67 dex。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙中半禁戒CIII]λλ1907,1909双线作为高电离发射的关键示踪物，利用JWST/NIRSpec数据探索高红移星系中CIII]发射的特性及其演化。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec棱镜数据构建61个CIII]发射星系样本，通过紫外和光学发射线诊断图(包括CIII]/HeII、CIV/HeII和OHNO图)以及宽巴耳末线存在与否来区分星暴星系和AGN宿主星系，使用Bagpipes进行SED建模获取物理参数。
AI.result: 半数样本星系(29/61)显示AGN活动迹象，13个可能为AGN；高红移(5<z<7)CIII]发射星系的等效宽度中值为22.8 Å，显著高于红移3-4对照样本的4.7 Å；在相同Muv范围内，CIII]等效宽度从z=3-4到z=5-7增加了约0.67 dex；识别出5个小红点源，其中1个为新发现。
AI.conclusion: JWST揭示了高红移(5<z<7)存在强CIII]发射星系群体，CIII]发射强度随红移显著增强，表明早期宇宙中电离辐射场或星系物理条件发生演化，AGN在高红移CIII]发射星系中普遍存在。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 半禁戒CIII] $λλ$1907,1909双线是早期宇宙中高电离发射的关键示踪物。我们利用来自CEERS、JADES、RUBIES和CAPERS等项目的公开JWST/NIRSpec棱镜数据，研究了红移z=5-7星系中的CIII]发射。我们构建了一个包含61个CIII]发射星系的样本，并使用(1)静止系紫外和光学发射线诊断图，以及(2)宽巴尔默发射线的存在/缺失，将它们分类为恒星形成星系或活动星系核(AGN)宿主星系。紫外诊断基于CIII]的静止系等值宽度(EW)与CIII]/HeII $λ$1640的组合，以及CIV的EW与CIV/HeII $λ$1640的组合。对于光学诊断，我们采用了OHNO图，该图结合了[OIII] $λ$5007、H$β$、[NeIII] $λ$3869和[OII] $λλ$3727,3729，并发现其在区分AGN和SFG方面效率较低。我们发现样本中一半的源（61个星系中的29个）至少表现出一个可靠的AGN活动迹象，而基于CIII]诊断，有13个是潜在的AGN。物理性质，包括恒星质量和恒星形成率，是通过使用Bagpipes进行光谱能量分布建模得出的。我们的分析揭示，JWST正在发现一个高红移（5<z<7）的强CIII]发射星系群体，其中位EW为22.8 Å。该EW高于红移3<z<4的对照CIII]发射星系样本（中位EW为4.7 Å）。我们发现，在相同的Muv范围内，CIII] EW从3<z<4到5<z<7增加了约0.67 dex，表明该谱线强度存在强烈的红移演化。最后，我们在样本中识别出五个源为小红点(LRDs)；其中四个已在文献中被识别为LRD，而一个在此首次提出。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，JWST揭示了高红移(5<z<7)存在强CIII]发射星系群体，CIII]发射强度随红移显著增强，表明早期宇宙中电离辐射场或星系物理条件发生演化，AGN在高红移CIII]发射星系中普遍存在。

title: ASKAP discovery of a 30 kpc bipolar outflow from the edge-on disk of the nearby spiral galaxy ESO 130-G012
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures, 5 tables; submitted to PASA, comments welcome
summary: We present the discovery of a large-scale, limb-brightened outflow, extending at least 30 kpc above and below the star-forming disk of the edge-on galaxy ESO 130-G012 (D = 16.9 Mpc). Partially obscured by Galactic foreground stars and dust, this optically unremarkable, low-mass galaxy reveals one of the largest known hourglass-shaped outflows from the full extent of its bright stellar disk. The outflow was discovered in 944 MHz radio continuum images from the Australian Square Kilometre Array Pathfinder (ASKAP) obtained as part of the "Evolutionary Map of the Universe" (EMU) project. Its height is at least 3x that of the stellar disk diameter (~10 kpc), while its shape and size most resemble the large biconical, edge-brightened FUV and X-ray outflows in the nearby starburst galaxy NGC 3079. The large-scale, hourglass-shaped outflow of ESO 130-G012 appears to be hollow and originates from the star-forming disk, expanding into the halo with speeds close to the escape velocity before likely returning to the disk. Given ESO 130-G012's modest star formation rate, the height of the outflow is surprising and unusual, likely made possible by the galaxy's relatively low gravitational potential. Follow-up observations are expected to detect hot gas inside the bipolar outflow cones and magnetic fields along the X-shaped outflow wings. Neutral gas may also be lifted above the inner disk by the outflow.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告发现了一个大规模、边缘增亮的外流，从侧向星系ESO 130-G012（距离D = 16.9 Mpc）的恒星形成盘上下延伸至少30 kpc。这个光学上不起眼的低质量星系，部分被银河系前景恒星和尘埃遮挡，却展现出从其明亮恒星盘全范围延伸出的已知最大沙漏形外流之一。该外流是在澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者（ASKAP）的944 MHz射电连续谱图像中发现的，这些图像来自“宇宙演化地图”（EMU）项目。其高度至少是恒星盘直径（约10 kpc）的3倍，而其形状和大小最类似于附近星暴星系NGC 3079中的大型双锥形、边缘增亮的远紫外和X射线外流。ESO 130-G012的大规模沙漏形外流似乎是中空的，起源于恒星形成盘，以接近逃逸速度的速度膨胀进入晕，之后可能返回盘。考虑到ESO 130-G012适中的恒星形成率，外流的高度令人惊讶且不寻常，很可能得益于该星系相对较低的引力势。后续观测有望探测到双极外流锥内的热气体以及沿X形外流翼的磁场。中性气体也可能被外流提升到内盘之上。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：尽管ESO 130-G012的恒星形成率不高，但其相对较低的引力势能使得大规模外流成为可能，这种外流可能将中性气体提升到内盘之上，后续观测有望探测到双极锥内的热气体和X形外流翼中的磁场。

title: The Simons Observatory: forecasted constraints on primordial gravitational waves with the expanded array of Small Aperture Telescopes
comment: 15 pages (excluding front matter), 4 figures, for submission to JCAP
summary: We present updated forecasts for the scientific performance of the degree-scale (0.5 deg FWHM at 93 GHz), deep-field survey to be conducted by the Simons Observatory (SO). By 2027, the SO Small Aperture Telescope (SAT) complement will be doubled from three to six telescopes, including a doubling of the detector count in the 93 GHz and 145 GHz channels to 48,160 detectors. Combined with a planned extension of the survey duration to 2035, this expansion will significantly enhance SO's search for a $B$-mode signal in the polarisation of the cosmic microwave background, a potential signature of gravitational waves produced in the very early Universe. Assuming a $1/f$ noise model with knee multipole $\ell_{\rm knee} = 50$ and a moderately complex model for Galactic foregrounds, we forecast a $1σ$ (or 68% confidence level) constraint on the tensor-to-scalar ratio $r$ of $σ_r = 1.2\times10^{-3}$, assuming no primordial $B$-modes are present. This forecast assumes that 70% of the $B$-mode lensing signal can ultimately be removed using high resolution observations from the SO Large Aperture Telescope (LAT) and overlapping large-scale structure surveys. For more optimistic assumptions regarding foregrounds and noise, and assuming the same level of delensing, this forecast constraint improves to $σ_r = 7\times10^{-4}$. These forecasts represent a major improvement in SO's constraining power, being a factor of around 2.5 times better than what could be achieved with the originally planned campaign, which assumed the existing three SATs would conduct a five-year survey.

AI.tldr: 西蒙斯天文台计划升级望远镜和探测器数量，延长观测时间，将显著提升对宇宙微波背景B模式偏振信号的探测能力，预计对张标比r的约束精度可达1.2×10⁻³。

AI.method: 采用1/f噪声模型（膝多极ℓ_knee=50）和中等复杂的银河系前景模型进行预测分析。假设通过大口径望远镜和高分辨率观测能够去除70%的B模式透镜信号，评估升级后的观测系统对张标比r的约束能力。

The solid line shows the lensing \(B\) -mode power spectrum in the absence of tensor modes ( \(r=0\) ). The signal for \(r=0.01\) is shown in dashed black. Current measurements from BICEP/ Keck (red, showing CMB bandpowers, 2021PhRvL.127o1301A ) , SPT-3G (black, showing bandpowers at 90 GHz, 2025arXiv250502827Z ) , and Polarbear (green, showing bandpowers at 150 GHz, 2022ApJ...931..101A ) are also shown for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：SO可实现的\(B\)模式功率谱及其不确定性，考虑了第2节所述的扩展。在10年观测后，假设无去透镜（橙色带）和70%去透镜（蓝色带），并假设“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型（详见第3.1节），展示了宽度\(\Delta\ell=10\)的带功率。实线显示在无张量模式（\(r=0\)）情况下的透镜\(B\)模式功率谱。\(r=0.01\)的信号以黑色虚线显示。同时显示了来自BICEP/Keck（红色，显示CMB带功率，2021PhRvL.127o1301A）、SPT-3G（黑色，显示90 GHz带功率，2025arXiv250502827Z）和Polarbear（绿色，显示150 GHz带功率，2022ApJ...931..101A）的当前测量结果以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The forecasted 68% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) , achievable by SO, as a function of time, accounting for the expansions described in Section 2 . “Y \(N\) ” denotes the \(N\) -th year after the start of observations. Results are shown assuming 50% and 70% delensing (blue and red, respectively), for different assumptions regarding \(1/f\) noise and foreground decorrelation. Each band covers the range of \(\sigma_{r}\) between the worst- and best-case scenarios (the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model with foreground frequency decorrelation as described by the moment expansions vs. the “optimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and no decorrelation). The constraints that the nominal SO configuration would have been able to attain, with the same foreground and noise assumptions, and \(A_{lens}=0.5\) , are shown as the gray hashed band.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)的预测68%约束随时间的变化，考虑了第2节所述的扩展。“Y \(N\)”表示观测开始后的第\(N\)年。结果显示了在50%和70%去透镜（分别为蓝色和红色）下，针对\(1/f\)噪声和前景去相关的不同假设。每个带覆盖了最差和最佳情况之间的\(\sigma_{r}\)范围（“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型与矩展开描述的前景频率去相关 vs. “乐观”\(1/f\)噪声模型且无去相关）。名义SO配置在相同前景和噪声假设下且\(A_{lens}=0.5\)所能达到的约束以灰色阴影带显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Forecasted 68% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) achievable by SO, accounting for the expansions described in Section 2 , after 5 and 10 years of observations. Results are shown for different assumptions regarding \(1/f\) noise and the impact of foreground frequency decorrelation (as characterised by a moments expansion). For comparison, also presented are the constraints forecasted for the nominal SO configuration, without the new SATs studied here, after 5 years of observations, and assuming 50% delensing.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)的预测68%约束，考虑了第2节所述的扩展，在5年和10年观测后。结果显示了针对\(1/f\)噪声和前景频率去相关影响（由矩展开表征）的不同假设。作为比较，还给出了名义SO配置（无此处研究的新SAT）在5年观测后且假设50%去透镜下的预测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The forecasted 95% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) and the scalar spectral index \(n_{s}\) that could be achieved by SO. Results are shown for the full SO SAT configuration, including the enhancements detailed in Section 2 , assuming 10 years of observation and 70% delensing. These forecasts are presented for two cases: (i) assuming the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and allowing for foreground frequency decorrelation (yellow), and (ii) assuming the “optimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and no frequency decorrelation (purple). The black line shows the prediction from \(R^{2}\) inflation (Starobinsky model) for a total number of \(e\) -folds in the range \(45 Planck ( planck_cosmo:2018 ) . For comparison, the red contours show the 95% constraints achievable by the nominal SO SAT configuration (assuming a 5-year survey and 50% delensing, as well as optimistic \(1/f\) noise and no frequency decorrelation), while the green contours show the current 68% and 95% constraints from BICEP/ Keck , Planck , and WMAP data ( 2021PhRvL.127o1301A ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)和标量谱指数\(n_{s}\)的预测95%约束。结果显示了完整的SO SAT配置，包括第2节详述的增强，假设10年观测和70%去透镜。这些预测针对两种情况呈现：(i) 假设“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型并允许前景频率去相关（黄色），以及(ii) 假设“乐观”\(1/f\)噪声模型且无频率去相关（紫色）。黑线显示了\(R^{2}\)暴胀（Starobinsky模型）在总\(e\)折叠数范围为\(45 < N < 60\)时的预测，并假设普朗克（planck_cosmo:2018）的最佳拟合宇宙学参数。作为比较，红色轮廓显示了名义SO SAT配置（假设5年巡天和50%去透镜，以及乐观\(1/f\)噪声且无频率去相关）可达到的95%约束，而绿色轮廓显示了来自BICEP/Keck、Planck和WMAP数据的当前68%和95%约束（2021PhRvL.127o1301A）。
